caption: A man wearing a green t-shirt and a green baseball cap with headphones sits in a studio setting, speaking into a professional microphone. He is positioned in front of a backdrop featuring a sign that says "UNIQUE FASHIONS" and a logo for "VEM VISUAL REALITY." In the background, clothing on hangers and other studio equipment are visible. Another person is partially visible on the right side of the frame, wearing a blue garment. On-screen text includes "T HE" and "RAY" in a stylized red and white font, alongside a circular logo that says "WORTH US." Throughout the sequence, the man remains in a seated position, gesturing with his hands and speaking, while the camera maintains a steady medium shot. There are very little changes in his position or the environment across the frames, capturing a brief moment of a conversation or interview.
